name: ecoone-visual-card
description: Home Assistant Lovelace card: premium minimal Eco One heat pump visualization with SVG overlays

scripts.build: vite build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const h=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8').replace('./src/ecoone-visual-card.ts','./ecoone-visual-card.js'); fs.writeFileSync('dist/index.html',h); if(fs.existsSync('EcoOneIllustration.png')) fs.copyFileSync('EcoOneIllustration.png','dist/EcoOneIllustration.png');"
